ogTitle: Lake Clarendon vs Lake Eacham: Climate Safety

heading: Lake Clarendon vs Lake Eacham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Clarendon, Queensland and Lake Eacham, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Eacham has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Lake Clarendon (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Clarendon or Lake Eacham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Clarendon has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Lake Eacham scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Clarendon scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Eacham scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Clarendon or Lake Eacham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Eacham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
